{{Quote|You're doing well, Jedi… too well. It's time to end this game!|Rax Joris to [[Jaden Korr]]|audio=16raj009.flac|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>}}
'''Rax Joris''' was a corrupt [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] warden in the [[Imperial Remnant]] who oversaw the compound on [[Dosuun]]. Occasionally, when boredom struck, he would let his prisoners loose and see if they could escape his clutches. They never did however, as his skill with a [[Concussion rifle/Legends|concussion rifle]] was too great.

In [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], he had camouflaged [[Imperial Saboteur]]s capture [[Jaden Korr]], who was on a [[Mission to Dosuun|mission]] on [[Dosuun]], and after allowing Korr to escape from his cell, decided to play his "game" with Korr. He taunted and shot at the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] from safe locations within the compound grounds, before holing up in the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]], after becoming worried about the Jedi's progress through the facility. Realizing that Korr would eventually find him, he took up his rifle and waited on the top level of the hangar, confident that he would be safe and that he could blast the Jedi.

When Korr entered the hangar bay, Joris shot at him with his concussion rifle, but Korr dodged the weapon's shots effortlessly and worked his way up to the top where Rax stood. He defeated Joris and reclaimed his stolen [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Behind the scenes==
{{Mediacat|soundcat=Audio files of Rax Joris}}
Joris's voice was provided by [[Gregg Berger]] for the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' game.

Rax Joris can also be killed by ranged weapons, such as a [[Disruptor rifle/Legends|disruptor rifle]], from the very lowest floors of the hangar bay, without even climbing to the top.
